name: ruby-skills
description: Ruby development skills for Codex - version manager detection, authoritative resource map, and test framework reference

interface.shortDescription: Ruby version, docs, and test framework guidance for Codex
interface.longDescription: Ruby Skills helps Codex detect Ruby version managers before running Ruby commands, use authoritative Ruby documentation sources, and avoid minitest versus test-unit API mixups.
defaultPrompt: Use Ruby Skills before running this project's tests.
Use Ruby Skills to inspect this Ruby project's setup.
